title: Baron Zemo's Mask
content:
{{Item |image = ZemosMaskProfilePic.png |creator = |made = |owners = [[Helmut Zemo]] |users = [[Helmut Zemo]] |tv series = ''[[The Falcon and The Winter Soldier]]''
*''[[Power Broker (episode)|Power Broker]]''
''[[What If...?]]''
*''[[What If... The Watcher Disappeared?]]'' (depiction) |game = ''[[Captain America: Super Soldier]]''
''[[The Avengers: The Movie]]'' (canceled) |status = Active}} '''Baron Zemo's Mask''' is a military mask worn by [[Helmut Zemo]]. ==History== ===Helmut Zemo's Freedom=== [[File:The Falcon and the Winter Soldier 79.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|[[Helmut Zemo]] dons his mask during a fight]] [[Baron Zemo]]'s Mask was being kept in one of the antique vehicles in the Zemo family [[Helmut Zemo's Garage|storage garage]]. When [[Helmut Zemo]] was collecting his former belongings before leaving for a mission in [[Madripoor]] with [[Sam Wilson]] and [[Bucky Barnes]], he noticed the purple mask sitting on the seat and decided to collect it. Zemo did not wear his mask until a confrontation with bounty hunters who were after Barnes, Wilson, Zemo, and [[Sharon Carter]]. Zemo put the mask on and wore it while attacking the bounty hunters, giving Barnes, Wilson, and Carter a chance to escape. Zemo defeated the bounty hunters and found a car, taking the mask off before stealing it and leaving with Barnes and Wilson.{{Ref|TFaTWS103}} ===Alternate Universe Versions=== ====Sleeper Activated==== In an [[Sleeper Activated Universe|alternate universe]], Baron [[Baron Zemo/Sleeper Activated|Heinrich Zemo]] wore a purple mask that loosely sat over his entire face and was adorned with a crown over it.''[[Captain America: Super Soldier]]'' ==Alternate Versions== {| {{Prettytable}} |- !width="25%"|Origin !width="15%"|Status !width="20%"|Creators !width="20%"|Owners
